infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: StayOn Host uses your location to set your property's location and timezone.

plugins.photosPermission: StayOn Host needs access to your photos to add pictures and videos of your property.
plugins.cameraPermission: StayOn Host needs camera access to take photos of your property.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: StayOn Host uses your location to set your property's location.
